caribbean.headline: Gusty Trades Bring Rough Seas to St. Maarten Today
caribbean.paragraph: St. Maarten is experiencing east winds to 25 kt with seas near 4.8 ft and an 8 s easterly swell; Freeport is seeing winds to 19 kt, and showers are possible with a 50% rain probability. I expect conditions to be choppy for small craft around St. Maarten and recommend operators prepare for gusts and brief heavy showers.

mediterranean.headline: NNE Swell and Gusts Affect Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing a NNE-dominant swell to 6.4 ft with a 7 s period and sustained winds near 25 kt, with 38% rain probability. I recommend small craft exercise caution and secure loose gear given the 25 kt winds and choppy 6.4 ft seas, while Dubrovnik remains lighter with winds around 16 kt and calmer conditions.
